_comment: Bad case 07 — low Whisper transcript quality. engine::process_transcript checks Input.quality < 0.3f and returns 'say again' without parsing intent or touching state. Part B verifies that with normal quality the same transcript is processed correctly. Requires the per-step `quality` schema field added in M5.
name: Bad case 07 — low quality transcript (LSZG EU)

say.note: Part A — quality below 0.3 threshold; engine answers 'say again', state unchanged
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi

say.note: Part B — pilot retransmits clearly; normal taxi clearance
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi
